task.title: Edit and rerun a search
task.shortdesc: You can edit and rerun a Remote z/OS Search or Remote z/OS File Search query from the Remote Systems view.

taskbody.prereq: Run a remote z/OS search or remote z/OS file search and have the search results displayed in the Remote z/OS Search view. See the related topics for instructions.

step.cmd: In the Remote z/OS Search view, display the results of the search query you want to edit and rerun.
step.info: If you completed more than one search, use the search history list to select the search query you want to edit and rerun.

step.cmd: Click Edit and run a search query in Remote Systems view Edit and run a search query.
step.stepresult: The search window opens with your previous search criteria.

step.cmd: Edit the search criteria and click OK.

link.linktext: Quick task: Creating reusable z/OS search queries
